design_philosophy: Neo-minimalism tailored for low-bandwidth, energy-constrained environments (Africa, Caribbean). The UI prioritizes Calmness, Trust, and High Legibility using 'Organic Imperfection' and structural clarity over heavy assets. We rely on typography, negative space, and CSS-level drawing (SVG/shapes) rather than large images to save data.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist hierarchy meets Soft Utility for max legibility on cheap LCD screens. Banned Inter. Using 'Outfit' for crisp headings and 'DM Sans' for highly readable body text.

spacing_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Bento grid adapted for mobile scrolling.

components.button_primary: bg-[#C84C31] rounded-full py-4 px-8 flex items-center justify-center active:opacity-80
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#E5E2D9] rounded-full py-4 px-8 flex items-center justify-center active:bg-[#E5E2D9]
components.card_base: bg-white border border-[#E5E2D9] rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm
components.input_base: bg-white border border-[#E5E2D9] rounded-2xl p-4 text-base text-[#1A1A1A] focus:border-[#C84C31]

icons.usage: Use Phosphor icons heavily for the 8 AI Agents instead of images to dramatically reduce app size and bandwidth.

media.strategy: Limit image usage to save bandwidth. Rely on these optimized selections ONLY when necessary (e.g. Hero banner, welcome screen).

image_urls.description: Background texture for the Welcome/Auth screen or AI Studio top section. Abstract terracotta geometric shapes.
Subtle abstract representation of Neural Networks/Algorithms for the Topic Picker.
Minimalist student portrait for the learning modules cover or profile placeholder.

feature_design_instructions.token_meter: Place prominently in the Header. Use a pill-shaped container `rounded-full` with a solid progress bar filled with `#4A5D4E` (Moss Green). Include testID='token-meter' and data-testid='token-meter'.
feature_design_instructions.ai_studio: Focus entirely on the input area. Provide a horizontal ScrollView of Agent Cards (using distinct Phosphor Icons instead of heavy imagery). Include testID='prompt-input' and testID='submit-prompt-button'.
feature_design_instructions.quiz_screen: Card-based interface. Each question is a card. Source citations MUST be displayed below the question in an 'overline' style block (`bg-[#F7F5F0] text-[#5C5E54] text-xs`). Use Moss Green for correct selections and Terracotta for incorrect.
feature_design_instructions.paywall: 3 vertical tier cards. Highlight the $10/month tier with an inner border of `#C84C31` and a subtle drop shadow. Free/BYOK is muted. Include testID='tier-free-btn', testID='tier-day-btn', testID='tier-sub-btn'.

testing_and_accessibility.test_attributes: EVERY interactive element (Buttons, Touchables, Inputs, specific views) MUST have a `testID` (for Native) and `data-testid` (for Web fallback) property. E.g., `testID='login-google-btn'`. Use kebab-case.
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against `#C84C31` and `#4A5D4E` is `#FFFFFF`. Text against `#F7F5F0` must be `#1A1A1A` or `#5C5E54`.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up Expo with NativeWind for styling. 2. Install @expo-google-fonts/outfit and @expo-google-fonts/dm-sans. 3. Build mobile-first. 4. Use the colors and typography from this JSON. 5. IMPORTANT: Because this is for low-bandwidth contexts, do not add arbitrary images. Use the provided image_urls sparingly, and use @phosphor-icons/react-native for UI graphics and agent avatars.
